entries.title: Plovdiv travel guide: How to spend 48 hours in Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city
entries.description: In this travel guide to Plovdiv, discover Roman sites, Bulgarian Revival houses and the best restaurants and bars.

entries.title: Plovdiv: jak spędzić 48 godzin w najstarszym nieprzerwanie zamieszkanym mieście Europy
entries.description: Przewodnik po Płowdiwie: rzymskie zabytki, domy z epoki odrodzenia narodowego oraz najlepsze restauracje i bary.

entries.title: Meet My Mama: how home cooks turned chefs are spicing up the French catering market
entries.description: “My cuisine is a bridge between Congo, my home country, and France,” says Marie-Clarisse, a home cook turned professional chef by Meet My Mama, a French start-up that's serving up fusion food for world class events. Valérie Gauriat discovers the recipe of their success.

entries.title: Meet My Mama: domowe kucharki odmieniają francuski rynek cateringu
entries.description: „Moja kuchnia jest mostem między Kongiem, moją ojczyzną, a Francją” – mówi Marie-Clarisse, szefowa kuchni dzięki Meet My Mama. Valérie Gauriat odkrywa przepis na ich sukces.

entries.title: Argentina survive major World Cup scare as Egypt edge past Australia
entries.description: World Cup newcomers Cape Verde scored one of the goals of the tournament against Argentina in Miami.

entries.title: NATO's drone problem: Can European industry close the gap?
entries.description: At NATO AIRCOM's Industry Day in Ramstein, Euronews had exclusive access, speaking to military leaders and defence companies about the race to develop cheaper, faster and more effective ways to counter drones.

entries.title: 'Vanishingly rare' copy of US Declaration of Independence discovered in the UK
entries.description: Graham Moore, the Revolution 250 curator at the National Archives, said the "exceptional" item was "one of the rarest forms of the Declaration we know about".

entries.title: Argentyna wychodzi z opresji na mundialu, Egipt minimalnie lepszy od Australii
entries.description: Debiutujące w mistrzostwach świata Wyspy Zielonego Przylądka strzeliły Argentynie w Miami jednego z najpiękniejszych goli turnieju.

entries.title: Cape Verde fans stand proud despite Argentina defeat
entries.description: Cape Verde supporters expressed pride in their team's historic World Cup campaign despite a 3-2 extra-time defeat to defending champions Argentina.

entries.title: Kibice Republiki Zielonego Przylądka dumni mimo porażki z Argentyną
entries.description: Kibice Wysp Zielonego Przylądka podkreślają dumę z historycznego występu swojej reprezentacji na mundialu, mimo porażki 2:3 po dogrywce z broniącą tytułu Argentyną.

entries.title: 20,000 protest against AfD party conference in Germany
entries.description: Thüringen police described the protest as "legitimate" but said an AfD constituency office and police officers had been attacked with paint bombs and fireworks.

entries.title: Iranians mourn as Khamenei funeral ceremonies begin
entries.description: Large crowds gathered in Tehran as Iran began six days of funeral ceremonies for late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, who was killed during the US-Israeli conflict.

entries.title: Iran opłakuje Alego Chameneiego, ruszają uroczystości pogrzebowe
entries.description: W Teheranie zgromadziły się tłumy. Iran rozpoczął sześciodniowe uroczystości pogrzebowe po śmierci najwyższego przywódcy Alego Chameneiego, zabitego w konflikcie USA–Izrael.

entries.title: Second World War gun recovered from river in Germany
entries.description: The town of Forst in Lower Lusatia was almost completely destroyed during heavy fighting between the German Wehrmacht and the Red Army in April 1945.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 4th, 2026 – Midday
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 4th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: Trump warns of communist threat as Washington parade cancelled due to heatwave
entries.description: "Communism is a mortal threat to American liberty," Trump said during a speech on Friday. "It is the greatest threat to our country".

entries.title: Ukraine strikes oil infrastructure sites near Saint Petersburg, Zelenskyy says
entries.description: It comes after Moscow launched a massive drone and missile barrage at Kyiv earlier this week, killing at least 30 people and hitting more than 20 sites across the city.

entries.title: Pope makes historic visit to Lampedusa, warns Europe: 'Deaths at sea are failures to act'
entries.description: Pope Francis has visited the island that symbolises the migrant crisis. Greeted by thousands, he stressed Europe’s duty to act and urged the faithful not to ignore the suffering of those forced to leave their homeland.

entries.title: Keir Starmer calls decision to resign as British PM 'intensely personal'
entries.description: Starmer also said the next prime minister would not be able to spend any less time focusing on diplomacy and international affairs, citing the impact of the wars in Ukraine and Iran on the cost of living.

entries.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce marry at Madison Square Garden in private but lavish wedding
entries.description: The wedding, officiated by Adam Sandler, was attended by roughly 1,000 guests, including many A-list celebrities, singers, athletes and close friends and family.

entries.title: Taylor Swift i Travis Kelce biorą wystawny, prywatny ślub w Madison Square Garden
entries.description: Ślub, który poprowadził Adam Sandler, zgromadził ok. tysiąc gości, w tym wielu gwiazdorów, piosenkarzy, sportowców oraz bliskich znajomych i rodzinę.

entries.title: World leaders and royals celebrate the US's 250th birthday
entries.description: "The story of the relationship between our two nations is one of extraordinary evolution, from overcoming conflict to forging one of the closest and most productive alliances the world has seen," King Charles III said.

entries.title: 400,000-year-old intact cave found in Israel sheds light on pre-Neanderthal era
entries.description: A prehistoric cave found near Foreidis in northern Israel is offering a rare glimpse into a little-known phase of human evolution. Sealed for hundreds of thousands of years, the site preserves tools, animal remains and evidence of prolonged occupation.

entries.title: Izrael: odkryto nienaruszoną jaskinię sprzed 400 tys. lat z epoki preneandertalczyków
entries.description: Prehistoryczna jaskinia odkryta koło Foreidis na północy Izraela odsłania rzadki wgląd w mało poznany etap ewolucji człowieka. Zachowała narzędzia, kości zwierząt i ślady długotrwałego zamieszkania.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 4th, 2026 – Evening
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 4th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: Thousands of protesters march throughout France to demand new law against sexual violence
entries.description: The rape and murder of 11-year-old Lyhanna in France has become a catalyst for demands to combat sexual violence against children with a "comprehensive framework law" that covers prevention and judicial treatment as well as support for victims.

entries.title: Diamonds are forever: Karlovy Vary film festival honours Dustin Hoffman on its 60th anniversary
entries.description: The largest cultural event in the Czech Republic, the Karlovy Vary international film festival is just getting underway with the famous spa town celebrating its diamond 60th edition. Jiri Skacel delves into the festival's past to explain its increasing popularity among younger cinephiles.

entries.title: Diamenty wiecznie żywe: festiwal w Karlowych Warach honoruje Dustina Hoffmana w 60. rocznicę
entries.description: Największy czeski festiwal filmowy w Karlowych Warach świętuje 60. edycję, a Jiri Skacel wyjaśnia jego rosnącą popularność wśród młodych kinomanów.

entries.title: 80 vials of fentanyl stolen from Rome hospital, enough for 20,000 doses
entries.description: 80 vials have disappeared from the capital's Jewish hospital pharmacy, with no sign of a break‑in. The synthetic opioid, 100 times stronger than morphine and a national emergency in North America, sparks an emergency meeting at Palazzo Chigi.

entries.title: Morocco beats World Cup co-host Canada 3-0 and advances to quarterfinals
entries.description: It’s Morocco’s second straight appearance in the quarterfinals after becoming the first African team to reach the semifinals in 2022.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 5th, 2026 – Morning
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 5th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: Stockholm travel guide: Sunsets, fika and island swimming in the stunning archipelago
entries.description: If you’re looking for the coolest of coolcations, then a visit to Sweden’s capital city should be on your travel bucket list. In this guide to Stockholm, Mike Starling goes chasing sunsets, gets a taste of fika, and goes wild swimming on a charming island in the archipelago.

entries.title: 'I believe in the secret of things': Author Orhan Pamuk opens up at the Museum of Innocence
entries.description: In an exclusive interview at the house in Çukurcuma which Orhan Pamuk turned into a museum, the Nobel Prize-winning author talked about the power of objects to bring back memories, the shocking nature of collecting and the legacy of the museum as a city memory for the future.

entries.title: Maroko i Francja w ćwierćfinale mistrzostw świata
entries.description: To drugi z rzędu awans Maroka do ćwierćfinału. W 2022 roku jako pierwszy afrykański zespół dotarło do półfinału.

entries.title: Fireworks light up Washington sky for America's 250th anniversary
entries.description: A fireworks display illuminated the National Mall in Washington as the United States marked the 250th anniversary of its independence.

entries.title: Fajerwerki rozświetlają niebo nad Waszyngtonem w 250. rocznicę niepodległości USA
entries.description: Pokaz fajerwerków rozświetlił National Mall w Waszyngtonie, gdy Stany Zjednoczone świętowały 250. rocznicę ogłoszenia niepodległości.

entries.title: Serbs are not 'little Russians', says former PM Ana Brnabić
entries.description: Serbia's former prime minister tells Euronews how Belgrade has backed Ukraine since the war began and rejects claims of being pro-Russian, while voicing Serbs' frustration at EU accession double standards.

entries.title: 'The American Dream is back,' Trump says during Fourth of July speech
entries.description: "Our warriors did not fight communism on battlefields across the world only to have that menace rear its ugly head right back here in America," Trump told a cheering crowd.

entries.title: Every room in this new boutique hotel in Paros has a private pool or a Jacuzzi
entries.description: The Parian Chronicle Hotel Paros, on the Greek island in the Cyclades, is exclusively for those over the age of 13.

entries.title: Każdy pokój w nowym butikowym hotelu na Paros ma prywatny basen lub jacuzzi
entries.description: Hotel Parian Chronicle Paros na greckiej wyspie Paros w Cykladach przyjmuje wyłącznie gości powyżej 13. roku życia.

entries.title: Spectacular find: 1,000-year-old Viking textile workshop unearthed
entries.description: An excavation near Aarhus in Denmark may fundamentally alter how we see the Viking Age: 82 pit houses identified as specialised textile workshops have been uncovered.

entries.title: Spektakularne odkrycie: odsłonięto tysiącletnią wytwórnię tkanin Wikingów
entries.description: Wykopaliska w pobliżu Aarhus w Danii przynoszą odkrycia, które mogą zmienić nasze rozumienie epoki wikingów. Odsłonięto 82 ziemianki uznane za wyspecjalizowane warsztaty tkackie.

entries.title: Zelenskyy and Putin hold Fourth of July phone calls with Trump
entries.description: Yuri Ushakov, a Russian presidential aide, said Putin and Trump discussed "the issue of the Ukrainian settlement" in a phone call that lasted an hour and twenty-five minutes.

entries.title: Eulogist at Khamenei funeral in Iran calls for death of Donald Trump
entries.description: Trump said in January that he had given “very firm instructions” to “wipe them off the face of this Earth” if Iran ever tried to assassinate him.

entries.title: Cargo ship reports being attacked in the Red Sea, maritime agency says
entries.description: "Vessels are advised to transit with caution and report any suspicious activity to UKMTO," the agency said.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 5th, 2026 – Midday
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 5th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: England’s Lake District unveils €47 unlimited travel pass for visitors
entries.description: Covering trains, buses and boats, getting around the famed Cumbrian landscape car-free is now easier and cheaper.

entries.title: Lake District wprowadza bilet za 47 € na nielimitowane podróże dla turystów
entries.description: Podróż po słynnym krajobrazie Kumbrji bez samochodu: pociągi, autobusy i łodzie są teraz łatwiejsze i tańsze.

entries.title: JD Vance says 'beautiful' Britain has been 'failed by its leadership'
entries.description: While he called Britain "amazing," Vance said there appeared to him to be something "very broken about British politics".

entries.title: Marine Le Pen and Jordan Bardella pledge unity ahead of judicial verdict
entries.description: This week, a Paris court will rule on whether Marine Le Pen can run in the 2027 presidential election. Ahead of the verdict, Le Pen and the party’s president Jordan Bardella pledged to work as a duo.

entries.title: French volunteers train with Ukrainian military intelligence's International Legion
entries.description: "I love being a soldier, and the situation in Ukraine touched my heart. So I made this decision with my heart," one French volunteer said of his decision to travel to Ukraine.

entries.title: Thousands swarm the streets of Tirana in major 'Pink Flamingo' anti-government protests
entries.description: Protesters chanted slogans and carried slogans reading "Albania is not for sale" as they protested PM Edi Rama on his 62nd birthday for protests opposing a holiday resort project linked to the Trump family in a protected area in a southwestern part of the country.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 5th, 2026 – Evening
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 5th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: At least eight killed in massive overnight Russian attack on Kyiv
entries.description: The attack, which was still underway early Monday morning, involved waves of ballistic and cruise missiles as well as drones. Explosions echoed across the city as civilians sought shelter in metro stations.

entries.title: 'Major damage' as Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands
entries.description: The eye of the Category 5 super typhoon passed over the tiny island of Rota Monday morning local time, bringing winds of more than 241 km/h, also hitting the nearby islands of Guam, Tinian and Saipan.

entries.title: Dusit’s new lakeside retreat in Hokkaido has villas, open-air bathing and stunning wooden décor
entries.description: For a peaceful escape in northern Japan, WE Hotel Toya, Dusit Collection offers guests a scenic night’s sleep overlooking Lake Tōya. There are also Japanese and Thai delicacies to choose from, made with locally sourced ingredients, as well as a spa and indoor hot baths.

entries.title: One of England’s ‘greatest results’ as they win a World Cup classic at the Azteca
entries.description: Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane were on target as Thomas Tuchel’s Three Lions dug deep to beat Mexico and set up a quarterfinal tie against Norway.

entries.title: Norway and England advance to World Cup quarterfinals as Brazil and Mexico head home
entries.description: Norway's Erling Haaland scored two goals after the 79th minute, bring his country to a late 2-1 win against Brazil, as Mexico fought back in vain against England as they lost 3-2.

entries.title: EXCLUSIVE: Commission prepares enlargement reform proposals to regain the initiative
entries.description: The European Commission is working on proposals to reform the enlargement process, aiming to regain control over a debate now largely shaped by member states and to avoid placing the burden of new safeguards discussions solely on Montenegro, the most advanced candidate country.

entries.title: Europe’s best islands for holidays in 2026, ranked by weather, food and greenery
entries.description: In a new study of Europe’s best island escapes for 2026, Spain and Croatia dominate the overall top 10 ranking.

entries.title: Najlepsze europejskie wyspy na wakacje 2026: pogoda, jedzenie, zieleń
entries.description: W nowym zestawieniu najlepszych europejskich wysp na wakacje w 2026 roku czołówkę rankingu zdominowały Hiszpania i Chorwacja.

entries.title: Latest news bulletin | July 6th, 2026 – Morning
entries.description: Catch up with the most important stories from around Europe and beyond this July 6th, 2026 - latest news, breaking news, World, Business, Entertainment, Politics, Culture, Travel.

entries.title: Mistrzostwa Świata 2026. Norwegia i Anglia w ćwierćfinale mundialu, Brazylia i Meksyk odpadają
entries.description: Norweg Erling Haaland zdobył po 79. minucie dwie bramki i zapewnił Norwegii  zwycięstwo 2:1 nad Brazylią, a Meksyk próbował odrobić straty, przegrywając ostatecznie z Anglią 3:2.

entries.title: Rolling Stones, deadites and pioneers: What to see, do or hear this week in Europe
entries.description: The Rolling Stones release their 25th album while 'Evil Dead Burn' brings more demonic drama to the big screen - here's what to look out for this week.

entries.title: Rolling Stones, demony i pionierzy: co zobaczyć, robić i usłyszeć w tym tygodniu w Europie
entries.description: Nowy tydzień w kulturze: The Rolling Stones wydają 25. album, a horror „Evil Dead Burn” wnosi na ekrany jeszcze więcej demonicznej grozy.

entries.title: FIFA lifts US striker Balogun's red card World Cup suspension after Trump calls Infantino
entries.description: In its statement, FIFA pointed to "article 27 of the FIFA disciplinary code" which allows the suspension to be "suspended for a probationary period of one year."

entries.title: Infantino o niezależnośi organów dyscyplinarnych FIFA w sprawie Baloguna
entries.description: Zgodnie z przepisami FIFA bezpośrednia czerwona kartka automatycznie oznacza jednomeczową dyskwalifikację, od której drużyna zawodnika nie może się odwołać.

entries.title: Activists covered in red paint protest bullfighting in Pamplona
entries.description: Animal rights activists covered in red paint protest bullfighting in Pamplona before the San Fermin Festival, calling for an end to the tradition.

entries.title: Europe Today: Ukraine, NATO and the future of EU enlargement
entries.description: Russia launches another deadly attack on Kyiv ahead of the NATO summit as Ukraine seeks stronger military support and progress on EU membership. Meanwhile, thousands protest against Germany's far-right AfD as the European Commission prepares reforms to the EU enlargement process.

entries.title: How does the EU ensure you swim in clean waters? Ask the Euronews AI chatbot
entries.description: 85 per cent of Europe’s bathing sites were in excellent condition in 2025, according to the 2026 EU Bathing Water Report. But how does Europe ensure high-quality bathing water across the bloc? Ask the Euronews AI chatbot.

entries.title: Aktywiści w czerwonej farbie protestują przeciw corridzie w Pampelunie
entries.description: Aktywiści na rzecz praw zwierząt, oblani czerwoną farbą, protestują przeciw korridom w Pampelunie przed San Fermin, domagając się końca tej tradycji.

entries.title: International group calls for AI safety measures for children ahead of UN summit
entries.description: More than 100 international groups say AI companies, not parents, should be responsible for child safety.

entries.title: Międzynarodowa grupa apeluje o bezpieczną sztuczną inteligencję dla dzieci przed szczytem ONZ
entries.description: Ponad 100 organizacji międzynarodowych uważa, że za bezpieczeństwo dzieci powinny odpowiadać firmy AI, a nie rodzice.

entries.title: Newsletter: Shining a light on who gets into the EU
entries.description: In today's newsletter: Debate ratchets-up about how to grow the 27-member club, Russia intensifies strikes on Ukraine's capital, and how the most high-ranking EU official will paper over a gaffe while at the NATO summit in Ankara.

entries.title: Ali Khamenei's coffin carried through the streets of Tehran
entries.description: Thousands of mourners gathered in Tehran as Iran began funeral ceremonies for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

entries.title: Trumna Alego Chameneiego niesiona ulicami Teheranu
entries.description: W Teheranie zebrały się tysiące żałobników na rozpoczęciu uroczystości pogrzebowych po śmierci najwyższego przywódcy Iranu ajatollaha Alego Chameneiego.

entries.title: Video: Inside the NATO summit where record European military spending buys American dependence
entries.description: This Tuesday, NATO leaders land in Ankara for an annual summit. The pre-negotiated statement promises an iron-clad 32-member family committed to collective protection. However, the official documents are not always reflecting the reality.

entries.title: How safe are the waters you swim in? Take our poll
entries.description: Europeans planning a beach trip this summer can rest easy: a recently published report shows that 96 per cent of Europe’s waters are safe for bathing. How is the European Union ensuring this? And are any gaps in its strategy putting Europeans at risk?

entries.title: 'The Trump Card': Reactions and viral memes to FIFA’s controversial US red card reversal
entries.description: If you get a red card at the World Cup, you miss the next game... Unless Donald Trump steps in. The world has reacted to the controversial move by FIFA to lift the ban given to the US team's star striker, following a call by Trump to Gianni Infantino.

entries.title: Mistrzostwa Świata 2026. Nietypowa analiza the Economist przed meczem Hiszpania-Portugalia
entries.description: Według „The Economist” Portugalia ma najbardziej „agresywny” hymn MŚ, a Hiszpania jest najczęściej wskazywanym wrogiem. Obie kadry zagrają w poniedziałek w 1/8 finału Mistrzostw Świata w Piłce Nożnej 2026.

entries.title: „Kartka Trumpa”: reakcje i memy po kontrowersyjnym anulowaniu czerwonej kartki USA przez FIFA
entries.description: Po interwencji Donalda Trumpa FIFA cofnęła zawieszenie gwiazdy reprezentacji USA po czerwonej kartce na mundialu. W sieci zawrzało.

entries.title: Australia and Fiji seal mutual defence pact in push to counter China in Pacific
entries.description: The signing of the defence treaty comes on the same day that Chinese state media reported a submarine had test-launched a long-range ballistic missile in the South Pacific, a move criticised by Australia.

entries.title: Mexico fans left heartbroken as World Cup dream comes to an end
entries.description: Mexico fans in Mexico City react with joy and heartbreak as England win 3-2 in a World Cup last-16 match, ending Mexico’s tournament run.

entries.title: Meksykańscy kibice załamani: koniec marzeń o mundialu
entries.description: Kibice w Meksyku przeżywają euforię i rozpacz: w stolicy oglądają, jak Anglia wygrywa 3:2 w 1/8 finału MŚ i kończy udział Meksyku w turnieju.

entries.title: Ukraine's ambassador: EU enlargement should focus on substance, not titles
entries.description: Ukraine's EU ambassador Chentsov says enlargement talks should focus on substance, not labels, as Kyiv pushes to move forward on the accession process as soon as possible.

entries.title: Trump attacks Meloni before Nato summit in Ankara: 'Needs a restraining order'
entries.description: Trump attacks Meloni ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara, posting a photo captioned 'A restraining order is needed', amid worsening US‑Italy ties.

entries.title: Ukraine's air defences failed to intercept any Russian ballistic missiles, air force says
entries.description: The US-made Patriot system remains Ukraine’s only effective defence against ballistic missiles, but officials say supplies of interceptors have fallen critically low.

entries.title: NATO leaders to affirm record defence spending as US plans European drawdown
entries.description: With Donald Trump still seething at allies' refusal to support his war with Iran, European governments hope to ease his anger with record defence spending announcements worth billions of euros.

entries.title: Festiwal K-pop w Chorzowie. SUHO z zespołu EXO wystąpi podczas Sound in Colors K-POP EXPOSÉ
entries.description: Lider zespołu EXO, SUHO, dołączył do line-upu festiwalu Sound in Colors K-POP EXPOSÉ, który odbędzie się 15 i 16 sierpnia w TAURON Parku Śląskim w Chorzowie. Artysta wystąpi pierwszego dnia z solowym koncertem. Obok niego w programie znajdą się ATEEZ, iKON, STAYC, AtHeart, MADEIN i The Wind.

entries.title: 'Defining image of the era of American history': July 4 Patriot Front photo goes viral
entries.description: The Fourth of July, marking the 250th anniversary of the founding of the United States, left behind a disturbing photograph depicting a young Black woman in a Washington Metro carriage, surrounded by masked white supremacists. Many have called for the Reuters photo to receive the Pulitzer Prize.

entries.title: Symbol epoki w historii USA: wiralowe zdjęcie z 4 lipca Patriot Front
entries.description: Czwarty lipca, w 250. rocznicę powstania USA, przyniósł niepokojące zdjęcie młodej czarnoskórej kobiety w wagonie metra wśród zamaskowanych białych supremacistów. Wiele osób domaga się dla fotografii Reutera nagrody Pulitzera.

entries.title: This beach in Cornwall was just named the best in the UK
entries.description: After visiting more than 600 sandy stretches across Britain and Northern Ireland, Bude Summerleaze took the top spot.

entries.title: Plaża w Kornwalii najlepsza w Wielkiej Brytanii
entries.description: Po obejrzeniu ponad 600 piaszczystych plaż w całej Wielkiej Brytanii i Irlandii Północnej najwyżej oceniono plażę Summerleaze w Bude.

entries.title: Oktoberfest 2026 preparations: city not seeking new records
entries.description: Excavators are back on Munich’s Theresienwiese: with under three months to go, work has begun on the world’s biggest folk festival, creating one of Europe’s largest temporary building sites by September’s ceremonial first keg.

entries.title: At least 19 killed and more than 100 wounded in Sri Lanka prison riot, officials say
entries.description: The wounded were rushed to the Negombo hospital, north of the capital Colombo, following overnight clashes between inmates from two drug gangs, police said.

entries.title: ‘Skillidays’: Nearly half of European travellers plan to learn a new skill this summer
entries.description: A survey by Mastercard has found that Europeans are swapping poolside lounging for pottery wheels, cooking classes and creative arts workshops when on holiday, with many valuing new skills gained over traditional keepsakes.

entries.title: Joy for England fans after dramatic World Cup victory
entries.description: England fans celebrated their team's dramatic 3-2 victory over Mexico as the Three Lions booked a place in the World Cup quarter-finals.

entries.title: Radość kibiców Anglii po dramatycznym zwycięstwie na mundialu
entries.description: Kibice Anglii świętowali dramatyczne zwycięstwo 3:2 nad Meksykiem, które dało Synom Albionu awans do ćwierćfinału mundialu.

entries.title: „Skillidays”: prawie połowa Europejczyków chce latem nauczyć się czegoś nowego
entries.description: Badanie Mastercard pokazuje, że na wakacjach Europejczycy coraz częściej wybierają zajęcia z ceramiki, gotowania i sztuki, ceniąc nowe umiejętności bardziej niż pamiątki.

entries.title: San Fermín 2026 kicks off with crowded rocket launch as Pamplona embraces festival
entries.description: The traditional chupinazo rocket has officially launched San Fermín 2026 in front of a packed City Hall square. Pamplona now embarks on nine days of festivities, with the first bull run set for Tuesday.

entries.title: San Fermín 2026 rozpoczyna się tłumnym chupinazo, a Pamplona żyje świętem
entries.description: Tradycyjny chupinazo oficjalnie rozpoczął San Fermín 2026 na wypełnionym po brzegi placu przed ratuszem. Pamplona zaczyna dziewięć dni świętowania, pierwszy bieg z bykami zaplanowano na wtorek.

entries.title: Greece: Civil Aviation Authority reports fewer flight delays recorded in June
entries.description: The problem of flight delays at Greek airports has now reached the highest echelons of the national government in Athens.

entries.title: Hamas announces dissolution of Gaza governing body, paves way for technocratic committee
entries.description: The move marks a significant political shift by Hamas, which has run Gaza since its fighters seized control from rival Palestinian movement Fatah in 2007.

entries.title: Venice Film Festival to honour George Clooney with Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement
entries.description: US actor, director and producer George Clooney is to receive the Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement at the upcoming Venice International Film Festival (2-12 September).

entries.title: Festiwal w Wenecji: Złoty Lew za całokształt dla George'a Clooneya
entries.description: Amerykański aktor, reżyser i producent George Clooney otrzyma Złotego Lwa za całokształt twórczości na tegorocznym festiwalu w Wenecji (2–12 września).

entries.title: UK fighter jets intercept Russian plane near aircraft carrier over Norwegian Sea
entries.description: The mission off Iceland has seen F-35 jets conduct NATO air defence operations from a European aircraft carrier for the first time and comes amid heightened tensions with Russia.

entries.title: Wildfire rages in eastern Spain, forcing hundreds to flee
entries.description: A wildfire in Castellon, eastern Spain, forces 500 evacuations as firefighters and aircraft battle flames spreading across the Valencia region.

entries.title: Pożar lasu wschodniej Hiszpanii: setki ewakuowanych
entries.description: Pożar lasu w Castellón we wschodniej Hiszpanii wymusił ewakuację 500 osób; strażacy i samoloty walczą z ogniem w regionie Walencji.

entries.title: Ice baths, saunas and hypoxic chambers: inside Erling Haaland's routine
entries.description: “I feel tired, but I tell my body I’m not,” that’s a motto of Erling Haaland, who leads Norway towards a first World Cup quarter-final. He shared his great performance secrets that include ice baths, fatty steaks and enough sleep with fans on YouTube before the World Cup.

entries.title: Lodowe kąpiele, sauna i komora hipoksyjna: treningowa rutyna Erlinga Haalanda
entries.description: „Czuję się zmęczony, ale mówię ciału, że nie” – mówi Erling Haaland, prowadząc Norwegię do pierwszego ćwierćfinału mundialu. Przed MŚ zdradził fanom na YouTube: klucz to zimne kąpiele, tłuste steki i sen.

entries.title: Norway releases first image of Crown Princess Mette-Marit after lung transplant
entries.description: Mette-Marit was diagnosed in 2018 with pulmonary fibrosis which causes scarring of the lungs and shortness of breath and she had been forced to scale back her duties over the years.

entries.title: How much is the EU earning from high-tech products?
entries.description: Europe is betting on tech sovereignty to strengthen its economy. So how important is high-tech manufacturing to the EU's marketplace, and which countries are leading the way?

entries.title: Opóźnienia lotów w Grecji pod lupą
entries.description: Greckie władze lotnicze odpowiadają na doniesienia o rosnących opóźnieniach lotów. Przekonują, że statystyki Eurocontrol nie odzwierciedlają rzeczywistego wpływu na pasażerów.

entries.title: One of Europe’s highest revolving restaurants just reopened in this Baltic capital
entries.description: Open once again, the Milky Way restaurant in Vilnius is only serving up wines from vineyards above 165 metres above sea level – the same height diners reach while eating there.

entries.title: The Rolling Stones’ Keith Richards: America is 'a bit of a disappointment at the moment'
entries.description: Prior to the release of their 25th studio album this Friday, Rolling Stones' Keith Richards has commented on whether one of their new songs is an anti-Trump track...

entries.title: Keith Richards z The Rolling Stones: Ameryka to dziś lekkie rozczarowanie
entries.description: Przed piątkową premierą 25. albumu studyjnego Rolling Stones gitarzysta Keith Richards skomentował, czy jedna z nowych piosenek jest wymierzona w Trumpa.

entries.title: UK sanctions Russian scientists and labs behind chemical attacks, foreign office says
entries.description: The institutions hit were SC Signal, a Russian state scientific research institute and GNIII VM, the country's Scientific Research and Testing Institute for Military Medicine.

entries.title: 'Not normal': Belgian fans react to FIFA's Balogun red-card U-turn
entries.description: Belgian fans said FIFA's decision to overturn Folarin Balogun's suspension was "not normal" ahead of Belgium's World Cup match against the United States.

entries.title: Catania Airport suspends flights following volcanic activity at Mount Etna
entries.description: Passengers are being urged to check their flight status, with some airlines being diverted to Palermo Airport.

entries.title: Wznowiono loty na lotnisku w Katanii po przerwie z powodu aktywności Etny
entries.description: Pasażerom wciąż zaleca się, by przed podróżą na lotnisko sprawdzali u przewoźnika status swojego lotu.

entries.title: Good breeding: Kazakh 'satin' horse becomes new national symbol
entries.description: A very rare satin hair coloured horse called Aqzhal is widely being celebrated in Kazakhstan as a traditional symbol of prosperity and power.

entries.title: Udana hodowla: kazachski „atłasowy” koń nowym symbolem narodowym
entries.description: W Kazachstanie szeroko świętuje się bardzo rzadkiego konia Aqzhan o jedwabistej sierści, uznawanego za tradycyjny symbol dobrobytu i potęgi.

entries.title: Italy tops European tourism in 2026: the most visited regions
entries.description: Visitor numbers rose in the first half of 2026, driven above all by foreign tourists. Tourism Minister Mazzi: 'The sector remains a pillar of the national economy.'

entries.title: Włochy liderem turystyki w Europie także w 2026: najbardziej odwiedzane regiony
entries.description: W pierwszej połowie 2026 roku więcej przyjazdów, głównie zagranicznych turystów. Minister turystyki Mazzi: sektor pozostaje filarem gospodarki.

entries.title: Green groups say EU-backed chemical alliance puts polluters first
entries.description: A watchdog's report challenges the industry's claims that European chemical manufacturers are facing an existential crisis due to high energy costs and Chinese competition – one of the pillars of the European Commission's competitiveness pledge.

entries.title: Ukraine hits vital oil refinery more than 2,500km behind Russian border
entries.description: While Russia continues to pound Ukraine with missiles and drones, killing at least 19 people and injuring dozens more in Kyiv, Ukraine is striking deep inside Russian territory as part of a campaign to degrade the Kremlin’s war machine.

entries.title: South Aegean bids for 2028 World Region of Gastronomy title
entries.description: Greece’s island cuisine stands out for its quality, nutritional value and, of course, its irresistible flavour.

entries.title: EU demands fairness and transparency after FIFA's Balogun reversal
entries.description: "We support the principle of fair play and transparent competition," the European Commission said as fury at FIFA intensifies.

entries.title: EXCLUSIVE: EU Commission and capitals headed for collision over Serbia's Cluster 3 negotiations
entries.description: Brussels is seeking to revive Serbia's accession bid and could discuss as early as Wednesday its case for opening Cluster 3. But EU capitals remain divided over whether recent measures are enough to offset wider democratic backsliding.  For some, it's too much, too soon.

entries.title: European Commission renews pressure to open new accession cluster with Serbia
entries.description: Commission pushes EU states to open Serbia's accession Cluster 3 in July, citing reform progress on foreign policy alignment, rule of law and electoral legislation. But the move is set to face opposition from the member states.

entries.title: RSF razes multiple villages in Darfur killing dozens as UN warns of rising attacks on children
entries.description: Sudan’s paramilitary Rapid Support Forces have razed multiple villages in the western regions of the country bordering Chad, killing many and displacing thousands as a separate UN report outlines that over 300 children were killed in their atrocities this year alone.

entries.title: Hungary could vote to oust president as early as next week as opposition complains of 'tyranny'
entries.description: Viktor Orbán's Fidesz is calling for protests after Prime Minister Péter Magyar filed a constitutional amendment to remove President Tamás Sulyok.

entries.title: Space debris on Queensland beach: 'space balls' washed ashore, do not touch
entries.description: In Australia, authorities warn after several so-called space balls appeared on a beach in Queensland. Anyone who finds one must call emergency services at once and must not touch it.

entries.title: Uwaga, kosmiczne odpady na plaży. Skąd wzięły się tam „space balls”?
entries.description: Władze Australii ostrzegają po znalezieniu na plażach Queensland kilku tzw. „Space Balls”. Znajdujący mają natychmiast dzwonić na numer alarmowy i nie dotykać obiektów.

entries.title: Pamplona's San Fermín festival begins with fireworks and celebrations
entries.description: Thousands gather outside Pamplona City Hall as fireworks, music and dancing mark the official opening of Spain's San Fermin Festival.

entries.title: Pamplona: rusza festiwal San Fermín
entries.description: Tysiące ludzi gromadzi się przed ratuszem w Pampelunie, a fajerwerki, muzyka i taniec inaugurują hiszpańskie święto San Fermina.

entries.title: Andros Routes: szlaki prowadzące do przyrodniczego i kulturowego dziedzictwa wyspy
entries.description: Szlaki są regularnie utrzymywane i oczyszczane dzięki pracy wolontariuszy z zespołu Andros Routes.

entries.title: Artists create giant sea animals from sand
entries.description: Artists create large sand sculptures of marine life on Rab island in Croatia during the Festival of Sand Sculptures, turning the beach into a temporary exhibition.

entries.title: Artyści rzeźbią gigantyczne morskie zwierzęta z piasku
entries.description: Na chorwackiej wyspie Rab artyści podczas Festiwalu Rzeźb z Piasku tworzą ogromne rzeźby morskich zwierząt, zamieniając plażę w wystawę.

entries.title: USA's Balogun has little impact as Belgium soars into World Cup quarterfinals against Spain
entries.description: USA star forward Folarin Balogun, whose one-game red-card suspension was controversially lifted by FIFA, ultimately played a forgettable role in the 4-1 loss against Belgium. Earlier, Spain took out Portugal 1-0.

entries.title: Macron arrives in Syria for first post-Assad visit by western European leader
entries.description: Macron will meet with Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa at the presidential palace and “engage directly with diverse Syrian people,” his office said.

entries.title: Oil tanker hit by 'unknown projectile' in Strait of Hormuz, British military says
entries.description: Iranian state television said a liquified natural gas tanker came under attack Tuesday in the Strait of Hormuz off Oman after ignoring warnings, implying Tehran carried out the assault on a tanker it said was carrying natural gas from Qatar.

entries.title: The Dean Munich marks Irish hotel brand’s second opening in Germany
entries.description: Located in Munich’s vibrant Westend neighbourhood, the design-led boutique hotel has 281 rooms, three bars, and a Japanese restaurant.

entries.title: France's Kylian Mbappé condemns 'despicable' Paraguayan senator over racist remarks
entries.description: “Through your recklessness and your brazen racism, the entire world has already forgotten the journey and the historic effort that your players accomplished during this World Cup,” Mbappé wrote on X.

entries.title: Punishing struggling EU candidates is wrong approach, Bosnia and Herzegovina ambassador says
entries.description: Bosnia and Herzegovina's EU ambassador warns that cutting Western Balkans funding over stalled reforms risks turning accession into a competition and fuelling anti-EU sentiment ahead of October elections.

entries.title: Andros Routes: Paths leading to the island's natural and cultural heritage
entries.description: The trails are systematically maintained and cleared, thanks to the ongoing efforts of the Andros Routes volunteer team.

entries.title: Euronews explains: The verdict that could end Marine Le Pen – and launch Jordan Bardella
entries.description: If the Paris Court of Appeal upholds Marine Le Pen's five-year ban from public office, the National Rally figurehead's long-held presidential ambitions would effectively be over.

entries.title: Death toll from China storms and floods rises to 15, state media says
entries.description: Scientists warn the intensity and frequency of global extreme weather events will increase as the planet continues to heat up because of fossil fuel emissions.

entries.title: EU to extend temporary message-scanning regime to detect child sexual abuse online
entries.description: The legislation has been dubbed "chat control" by its critics, due to its privacy implications, particularly on end-to-end encrypted communications.

entries.title: Europe Today: NATO summit opens in Ankara under Trump pressure to boost defence spending
entries.description: NATO leaders are gathering for a two-day summit in Ankara under pressure from Trump to increase defence spending. In France, Marine Le Pen will find out today whether she can run for the French presidency next year as a Paris appeals court decides whether to uphold her embezzlement conviction.

entries.title: Słaby Balogun, Belgia w ćwierćfinale mundialu z Hiszpanią
entries.description: Gwiazda ofensywy USA Folarin Balogun, którego kontrowersyjne zawieszenie po czerwonej kartce FIFA anulowała, nie zapisał się w pamięci w przegranym 1:4 meczu z Belgią. Wcześniej Hiszpania pokonała Portugalię 1:0.

entries.title: Wyrok, który może zakończyć karierę Marine Le Pen i wynieść Jordana Bardellę
entries.description: Jeśli paryski sąd apelacyjny podtrzyma pięcioletni zakaz pełnienia funkcji publicznych wobec Marine Le Pen, jej wieloletnie ambicje prezydenckie praktycznie legną w gruzach.

entries.title: Hong Kong activist Joshua Wong set for September sentencing in second national security case
entries.description: Wong rose to prominence in Hong Kong in 2012 as a high school student leading protests against the introduction of national education in the city's schools.

entries.title: Newsletter: NATO braces for impact
entries.description: In this newsletter: 32 North Atlantic Treaty Organisation (NATO) members meet for an annual summit in the Turkish capital aiming to keep Trump onside, and a French appeals court will offer a decisive ruling for presidential hopeful Marine Le Pen.

entries.title: Watch: Planning to visit Europe this summer? The new Entry/Exit System means longer queues
entries.description: If you hold a non-EU passport, Brussels has a brand-new welcome package for your next European holiday. The Entry/Exit System was designed to log your face and fingerprints in around 70 seconds to catch overstayers. But the system isn't working as intended.

entries.title: 'No lasting peace' in the Middle East without a Palestinian state, Egypt's al-Sisi says
entries.description: The Egyptian president renewed Cairo's call for an independent Palestinian state during the inauguration of the country's new Strategic Command Headquarters, known as the Octagon.

entries.title: Giant Lego World Cup trophy unveiled in New York
entries.description: A giant Lego FIFA World Cup trophy built from 1.36 million bricks is unveiled at Rockefeller Plaza in New York by Cafu and designer Christophe Vietti.

entries.title: Hungry for a slice? Here are the best places in Europe to eat pizza... except Italy
entries.description: From London to Zagreb, the 2026 Top Pizza Europa awards reveal the best places to eat pizza. While Italy will always take the pizza crown, here’s what’s on the menu across the rest of the continent.

entries.title: W Nowym Jorku odsłonięto gigantyczny puchar mundialu z klocków Lego
entries.description: Na Rockefeller Plaza w Nowym Jorku odsłonięto gigantyczny puchar mundialu FIFA z klocków Lego, zbudowany z 1,36 mln elementów, przez Cafu i Christophe'a Vietti.

entries.title: Najlepsze miejsca w Europie na pizzę poza Włochami
entries.description: Od Londynu po Zagrzeb ranking Top Pizza Europa 2026 wskazuje najlepsze pizzerie. Włochy wciąż królują, ale reszta kontynentu też ma się czym pochwalić.

entries.title: Party Rock Anthem singer Lauren Bennett dies aged 37
entries.description: The British singer Lauren Bennett, who sang on the 2011 electronic dance hit 'Party Rock Anthem' has died at the age of 37.

entries.title: Wokalistka „Party Rock Anthem” Lauren Bennett nie żyje w wieku 37 lat
entries.description: Brytyjska piosenkarka Lauren Bennett, znana z przeboju dance „Party Rock Anthem” z 2011 roku, zmarła w wieku 37 lat.

entries.title: Brytyjskie wojsko: tankowiec trafiony „nieznanym pociskiem” w cieśninie Ormuz
entries.description: Irańska telewizja państwowa podała, że we wtorek w cieśninie Ormuz koło Omanu zaatakowano tankowiec LNG, który zignorował ostrzeżenia, sugerując, że Iran uderzył w jednostkę z gazem ziemnym z Kataru.

entries.title: When do you need to hand in a sick note in Europe and which sick pay systems are the most generous?
entries.description: As Germany moves to clamp down on what the government sees as too many people taking sick leave, how do sick leave pay and medical certificate rules compare across Europe?

entries.title: At least 18 wounded in Damascus blasts during Macron visit, Syrian officials say
entries.description: Macron had entered the presidential palace to meet Syrian President Ahmad al-Sharaa when the explosions happened near the Four Seasons Hotel.

entries.title: San Fermín festival begins with Pamplona's famous bull run
entries.description: The first San Fermin 2026 bull run takes place in Pamplona as runners race six bulls through the streets during the famous 'encierro'.

entries.title: Festiwal San Fermín zaczyna się słynnym biegiem byków w Pampelunie
entries.description: Pierwszy bieg z bykami San Fermin 2026 w Pampelunie: biegacze pędzą z sześcioma bykami przez ulice podczas słynnego encierro.

entries.title: Eksplozja ładunków wybuchowych w pobliżu hotelu, w którym przebywa Macron w Damaszku
entries.description: Macron wszedł do pałacu prezydenckiego, aby spotkać się z prezydentem Syrii Ahmadem al-Sharaa, kiedy w pobliżu hotelu „Four Seasons” doszło do wybuchów.

entries.title: How Europe made most, but not all, of its swimming waters 'excellent'
entries.description: Planning a swim this summer? Chances are you'll be diving into clean water. A new European Environment Agency report shows that 96 percent of monitored bathing sites across the EU meet minimum health standards, with nearly 85 percent rated "excellent". But why are some swimming spots still unsafe?

entries.title: Cooling down a 'logistical nightmare' at Tour de France, champ Tadej Pogacar says
entries.description: Beyond just the heat, Monday's third stage from Granollers in Spain, over the border into Les Angles in France, was threatened by wildfires which had broken out around 70km from the finish.

entries.title: Argentina fans gather in Atlanta for traditional World Cup 'banderazo'
entries.description: Hundreds of Argentina supporters gathered in Atlanta for a traditional banderazo rally ahead of their World Cup last-16 match against Egypt.

entries.title: Kibice Argentyny gromadzą się w Atlancie na mundialowy 'banderazo'
entries.description: Setki kibiców Argentyny zebrały się w Atlancie na tradycyjnym banderazo przed meczem 1/8 finału mistrzostw świata z Egiptem.

entries.title: Love, power and betrayal: Tosca rehearsals begin at Austria's St Margarethen quarry
entries.description: Rehearsals for Tosca at Austria's St Margarethen Quarry are underway, opening an evocative journey into Puccini's Rome, where light and shadow meet faith and revolution.

entries.title: As-Sisi: niepodległe państwo palestyńskie kluczem do trwałego pokoju na Bliskim Wschodzie
entries.description: Prezydent Egiptu ponowił apel o utworzenie niepodległego państwa palestyńskiego podczas otwarcia nowej kwatery głównej dowództwa, tzw. Oktagonu.

entries.title: US fans react as Belgium ends World Cup dream
entries.description: Belgium ended the United States' World Cup campaign with a 4-1 victory in Seattle, booking a place in the quarter-finals.

entries.title: Could military-age Ukrainian men lose temporary protection status in Germany?
entries.description: More than 260,000 Ukrainians of fighting age are living in Germany. As Kyiv and Berlin discuss ways to encourage their return, the question is: would they go back?

entries.title: TAEMIN wystąpi w Chorzowie. Gwiazda SHINee zagra na festiwalu Sound in Colors K-POP EXPOSÉ
entries.description: Na festiwalu Sound in Colors K-POP EXPOSÉ w Chorzowie zagra kolejna wielka gwiazda K-pop Organizatorzy ogłosili, że TAEMIN, z grupy SHINee i jeden z najbardziej cenionych solowych artystów K-popu, wystąpi 16 sierpnia podczas drugiego dnia festiwalu K-pop.

entries.title: NATO to put pressure on allies not stepping up, warns Dutch minister
entries.description: As the Netherlands announced an extra €3 billion euros new spending at the NATO summit in Ankara, Dutch Defence Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz-Zegerius tells Europe Today that extra pressure will be applied to NATO allies not stepping up on defence.

entries.title: Nothing beats a Jet2 holiday, but what about a Jet2 wedding?
entries.description: Planning a wedding in Europe can be a lot to organise, but now Jet2 has added new destinations for the big day, including Malta, Italy, Greece, Spain, Türkiye and Portugal.

entries.title: Macron tours Damascus' Umayyad Mosque during Syria visit
entries.description: French President Emmanuel Macron visits Damascus' Umayyad Mosque with Syrian leader Ahmed al-Sharaa and signs the guestbook during his Syria trip.

entries.title: Euro area 'under strain' as recession risks loom
entries.description: Rolf R. Strauch, Chief Economist at the European Stability Mechanism, said governments "have to create growth" to avoid a possible recession. The global instability poses "high demands" in governments that have to face them with limited fiscal space.

entries.title: Macron zwiedza meczet Umajjadów w Damaszku podczas wizyty w Syrii
entries.description: Prezydent Francji Emmanuel Macron odwiedza meczet Umajjadów w Damaszku z syryjskim przywódcą Ahmedem al‑Sharaa i podpisuje księgę pamiątkową podczas wizyty w Syrii.

entries.title: ‘Overturn this’: Belgium mocks Donald Trump and FIFA with dance and post after victory against US
entries.description: Belgium has ended the USA’s World Cup campaign, with many taking great joy in the host nation’s humiliating 4-1 defeat following the controversy over FIFA’s decision to suspend a US red card prior to the game.

entries.title: „Odwróć to”: Belgia kpi z Trumpa i FIFA tańcem i wpisem po wygranej z USA
entries.description: Belgia zakończyła udział USA w mundialu, a wielu kibiców cieszyło się z upokarzającej porażki gospodarzy 1:4 po kontrowersji z anulowaniem czerwonej kartki.

entries.title: Has online shopping from outside the EU become more expensive?
entries.description: Several social media users are claiming that online shopping has become more expensive because of a new EU import charge. The Cube takes a look.

entries.title: South Korean law targeting 'fake news' takes effect as journalists' groups raise concerns
entries.description: South Korea saw a surge in online misinformation following the botched 2024 martial law attempt, including unsubstantiated allegations of Chinese interference in the electoral system.

entries.title: Dustin Hoffman and Maggie Gyllenhaal honoured at Karlovy Vary Film Festival opening ceremony
entries.description: The 60th Karlovy Vary International Film Festival opened with a star-studded ceremony, welcoming Hollywood names including Dustin Hoffman, Maggie Gyllenhaal, Harvey Keitel and Jesse Eisenberg.

entries.title: US President Donald Trump arrives in Turkey to attend NATO summit
entries.description: The two-day gathering in Ankara comes a year after NATO members pledged to ramp up security-related spending to 5% of GDP under pressure from the US leader. Yet, the US President has lashed out at European allies over Iran.

entries.title: European Parliament to ask for probe into FIFA boss Infantino over Balogun red card
entries.description: A letter circulating in the European Parliament calls for an investigation into whether pressure from the US administration influenced FIFA's decision to reverse American striker Folarin Balogun's red card suspension. Belgium went on to rout Team USA 4-1 in a resounding victory.

entries.title: 'Portugal is an energy island and needs more flexibility,' minister says
entries.description: The Portuguese government argues that because limited connections isolate Iberia from the European grid, the country faces many of the same challenges as the EU's outermost regions and deserves compensation for the lack of interconnections.

entries.title: European Parliament approves free cabin luggage and new delay compensation rules for air passengers
entries.description: Lawmakers gave the final green light to the revised regulation after a decade of talks with EU countries. Airlines argue the new rules will inevitably lead to higher ticket prices. Passenger associations say rights have been upheld.

entries.title: Is Google using your searches to train its AI? Here's how to opt out
entries.description: The changes reflect a broader industry shift. Rather than relying solely on data scraped from the web, companies are increasingly mining people's everyday interactions with digital services.

entries.title: Czy Google wykorzystuje twoje wyszukiwania do trenowania AI? Oto jak zrezygnować
entries.description: Te zmiany pokazują szerszy zwrot w branży. Firmy coraz rzadziej polegają wyłącznie na danych z sieci, a coraz częściej analizują codzienne interakcje użytkowników z usługami cyfrowymi.

entries.title: Parkout, the app connecting drivers to parking spaces in Athens
entries.description: It operates in Athens districts without controlled parking, outside the historic centre, and lets drivers signal a freed space so a nearby motorist can claim it.

entries.title: Hyperion GR-1 enters orbit: A new step for Greece's space programme
entries.description: It is the first Greek optical microsatellite developed under the National Microsatellite Programme - launched from Cape Canaveral.

entries.title: Ukrainian agent confesses to killing woman suspected of Monaco bombing, security service says
entries.description: The announcement comes after authorities across Europe were hunting for the woman suspected of planting a bomb in Monaco that wounded three people, including a Ukrainian-born tycoon and his teenaged son.

entries.title: French court upholds Le Pen's fraud conviction but clears way for 2027 presidential bid
entries.description: During the appeal trial, Le Pen denied that the National Rally had a system to embezzle European Parliament funds and said the party acted in "good faith."

entries.title: No passport needed: Use your face for a ‘fast pass’ in Qatar’s international airport
entries.description: Hamad International Airport and Qatar Airways have launched a new biometric service that uses facial recognition for passengers to have a paperless departure in Doha.

entries.title: Fast pass na lotnisku w Katarze: twarz zamiast paszportu
entries.description: Międzynarodowe lotnisko Hamad i Qatar Airways uruchomiły nową usługę biometryczną z rozpoznawaniem twarzy, która umożliwia pasażerom odprawę bez dokumentów papierowych w Doha.

entries.title: ‘Misaligned’: Controversial AI-generated 'actress' Tilly Norwood to make feature film debut
entries.description: The divisive digital “performer” is about to star in the upcoming Particle6 project titled 'Misaligned'. Get ready to roll your eyes when you read the plot synopsis.

entries.title: „Misaligned”: kontrowersyjna aktorka AI Tilly Norwood debiutuje w pełnym metrażu
entries.description: Kontrowersyjny cyfrowy „performer” zagra główną rolę w nowym projekcie Particle6 zatytułowanym „Misaligned”. Streszczenie fabuły aż prosi się o przewrócenie oczami.

entries.title: Euronews launches Kazakh language broadcasting in Astana
entries.description: As part of its continued development in Central Asia, Euronews now takes the strategic step to launch its new Kazakh language service and bring its European-perspective journalism and global coverage to Kazakhstan.

entries.title: Euronews uruchamia nadawanie po kazachsku w Astanie
entries.description: W ramach dalszej ekspansji w Azji Centralnej Euronews uruchamia serwis w języku kazachskim, oferując Kazachstanowi europejskie spojrzenie i globalne relacje.

entries.title: Goats roam free in this French Alpine village
entries.description: Les Lindarets in the French Alps is known for goats roaming freely through its streets, attracting visitors who feed and interact with the animals.

entries.title: Kozy swobodnie przechadzają się po alpejskiej wiosce we Francji
entries.description: Les Lindarets w Alpach Francuskich słynie z kóz swobodnie chodzących po ulicach, przyciągając turystów, którzy je karmią i głaszczą.

entries.title: NATO must become more European to reduce reliance on US security, von der Leyen and Rutte say
entries.description: "To stay transatlantic, we have to become more European," Mark Rutte said ahead of a NATO summit in Ankara, where European allies are expected to showcase their beefed-up defence spending plans.

entries.title: Zelenskyy renews call for Ukraine's NATO membership citing military might ahead of summit
entries.description: The Ukrainian President has renewed his push to join NATO, insisting his country has already proved itself a reliable partner and that its membership in the alliance would be “entirely natural”.

entries.title: Canary Islands' new voluntary tourist tax will fund local sustainability projects
entries.description: Rather than introducing a mandatory tourist tax, the Canary Islands are enlisting travellers to contribute to local projects aimed at restoring nature and supporting communities to make tourism sustainable.

entries.title: Dobrowolny podatek turystyczny na Wyspach Kanaryjskich zasili projekty zrównoważonego rozwoju
entries.description: Zamiast wprowadzać obowiązkową opłatę turystyczną, Wyspy Kanaryjskie zachęcają podróżnych do wspierania lokalnych projektów odbudowy przyrody i społeczności, by turystyka była zrównoważona.

entries.title: What is GlobalEye, the Swedish aircraft set to become NATO’s new ‘eyes in the sky’?
entries.description: As NATO members discuss future defence capabilities in Ankara, Swedish defence company Saab announced its GlobalEye aircraft will become the alliance’s new “eyes in the sky”.

entries.title: Czym jest GlobalEye, szwedzki samolot, który ma zostać nowymi „oczami NATO w niebie”?
entries.description: Podczas rozmów NATO o przyszłych zdolnościach obronnych w Ankarze szwedzka firma Saab ogłosiła, że samolot GlobalEye stanie się nowym „lotnym okiem” Sojuszu.

entries.title: Nigel Farage says he's resigning as MP and will run in 'people vs. the establishment' by-election
entries.description: "I've decided that the people of Clacton should be the judges of my actions," Farage said. "It's a chance to stick two fingers up to the entire establishment".

entries.title: Why Europe struggles to turn world-class science into business
entries.description: In the global race for innovation, the winners are those who can finance, test, manufacture and scale up new technologies the fastest, writes Italy's former Prime Minister, Enrico Letta, in an opinion piece for Euronews, calling for a "fifth freedom" for the EU.

entries.title: Brussels pitches AI cybersecurity plan amid dependence on US models
entries.description: EU unveils an AI cybersecurity action plan, but offers mostly recommendations as Brussels leans on negotiated access to US AI models like Anthropic's Mythos, exposing its tech dependency.

entries.title: Trump revives his call for US to 'control' Greenland
entries.description: Arriving at the NATO summit, the US president claimed Denmark hasn't sufficiently invested in the Arctic territory's security.

entries.title: Third tanker hit in Strait of Hormuz in 24 hours, maritime agency says
entries.description: The UKMTO maritime agency is investigating the incidents and advised vessels in the area to proceed with caution.

entries.title: EU still can't prove €43 billion in home renovation funds actually saved energy
entries.description: The EU accelerated home renovations after the pandemic, but according to its own auditors, it still lacks convincing evidence that the program delivered the energy savings and value for taxpayers that justified its massive investment.

entries.title: Lockheed Martin and Rheinmetall plan first ATACMS missile production in Europe
entries.description: German defence giant Rheinmetall is to produce missiles designed by US aerospace firm Lockheed Martin, the two firms announced on Tuesday, marking the first time the weapons will be produced in Europe.

entries.title: 'Public media cannot lie': Hungary pulls plug on state broadcaster in post-Orbán purge
entries.description: Hungary's public broadcaster went off-air on Tuesday, replaced by an on-screen apology, after Péter Magyar's new government installed interim management and sacked staff accused of pro-Orbán bias.

entries.title: European Parliament triggers procedure to ban Alternative for Germany’s EU party
entries.description: Europe of Sovereign Nations will now face a process that could see it stripped of its status as a European political party, losing funding in the process. Far-right MEPs from other groups opposed the decision.

entries.title: International Olympic Committee eases restrictions on Russian athletes
entries.description: Russian athletes looking to return to international competition will now be able to compete as long as they "meet relevant anti-doping requirements," the IOC said.

entries.title: Tibetan activists detained outside Chinese Embassy in New Delhi
entries.description: Tibetan Youth Congress activists are detained by police during a 'Free Tibet' protest outside the Chinese Embassy in New Delhi on 7 July 2026.

entries.title: Tybetańscy aktywiści zatrzymani przed ambasadą Chin w Nowym Delhi
entries.description: Policja zatrzymuje aktywistów Tibetan Youth Congress podczas protestu „Wolny Tybet” przed ambasadą Chin w Nowym Delhi, 7 lipca 2026 r.

entries.title: Prince Harry loses London High Court privacy case against Associated Newspapers
entries.description: In a statement, an Associated Newspapers spokesperson called it an "overwhelming victory for the Daily Mail and its journalists" and a "magnificent vindication of the paper's journalism.

entries.title: Ratify Mercosur or risk losing South America to China, Uruguay warns EU
entries.description: In an exclusive interview with Euronews, Montevideo's foreign minister, Mario Lubetkin, talks about the Mercosur trade agreement, Uruguay's political options and Trump's attempts at imposing his will in the Western Hemisphere.

entries.title: Marine Le Pen vows to run in France’s 2027 presidential election despite fraud conviction
entries.description: The leader of the National Rally announced on French TV that she would remain a candidate for the 2027 presidential election despite a court finding her guilty of embezzling EU funds.

entries.title: "Nikczemna kobieta". Kylian Mbappé ostro odpowiada paragwajskiej senatorce na rasistowskie uwagi
entries.description: „Przez twoją brawurę i bezczelny rasizm cały świat zdążył już zapomnieć o drodze i historycznym wysiłku waszych piłkarzy podczas tego mundialu” – napisał Mbappé na platformie X.

entries.title: Argentina mount epic comeback to beat Egypt as they move into quarterfinals
entries.description: Argentina trailed 2-0 with around 11 minutes to play. A late Enzo Fernández header saw them snatch a 3-2 victory and move into the quarterfinals.

entries.title: MKOl łagodzi ograniczenia wobec rosyjskich sportowców przed igrzyskami w Los Angeles w 2028 roku
entries.description: Rosyjscy sportowcy chcący wrócić do międzynarodowej rywalizacji będą mogli startować, jeśli spełnią odpowiednie wymogi antydopingowe – poinformował MKOl.

entries.title: Argentyna odrabia straty z Egiptem i awansuje do ćwierćfinału
entries.description: Argentyna była o krok od sensacyjnego pożegnania z mundialem. Egipt postawił aktualnym mistrzom świata niezwykle trudne warunki, prowadził już 2:0 i długo pachniało największą sensacją turnieju.

entries.title: Argentina fans sing and dance after dramatic World Cup comeback against Egypt
entries.description: Argentina fans erupted in celebration after the defending champions came from two goals down to beat Egypt 3-2 and reach the World Cup quarter-finals.

entries.title: Kibice Argentyny świętują po dramatycznym odwróceniu losów meczu z Egiptem
entries.description: Kibice Argentyny wybuchli radością, gdy broniący tytułu zespół odrobił dwie bramki straty, pokonał Egipt 3:2 i awansował do ćwierćfinału mundialu.

entries.title: Estonia and Ukraine sign drone pact to deepen defence industry ties
entries.description: 'Ukraine has developed one of the most competitive defence industries in the world' through its experience fighting Russia's full-scale invasion, Michal said.

entries.title: Nairobi man shares home with rescued birds
entries.description: Nairobi's 'Birdman' Rodgers Magutha rescues injured birds and lives with them, while defending his unusual bond with wildlife and conservation work.

entries.title: Mieszkaniec Nairobi dzieli dom z uratowanymi ptakami
entries.description: „Ptasi człowiek” z Nairobi, Rodgers Magutha, ratuje ranne ptaki i mieszka z nimi, broniąc swojej niezwykłej więzi z dziką naturą i ochroną przyrody.

entries.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran after ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz
entries.description: NATO described the US attack as "necessary", as Iran warned Washington it would review what response was needed.

entries.title: Argentina survives major scare from Egypt and heads into World Cup quarterfinals against Switzerland
entries.description: Trailing 2-0 against Egypt with 11 minutes of regular time to play on Tuesday, the defending champions rallied for an improbable 3-2 victory and a spot in the quarterfinals against Switzerland, which defeated Colombia in a penalty shootout.

entries.title: Lithuania seeks China reset while maintaining hard line on Russia
entries.description: Lithuania's incoming government has pledged to maintain a hard line on Russia while moving to restore diplomatic ties with China.

entries.title: Argentyna o włos od porażki z Egiptem, w ćwierćfinale zagra ze Szwajcarią
entries.description: Broniący tytułu przegrywali we wtorek z Egiptem 0:2 na 11 minut przed końcem, ale odwrócili losy meczu, wygrywając 3:2 i awansując do 1/4 finału, gdzie zagrają ze Szwajcarią, która po karnych pokonała Kolumbię.

entries.title: Dinner diplomacy: Von der Leyen and Erdoğan’s working dinner comes with a side of tension
entries.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen will have to chew over much more than just hors d'oeuvres Wednesday evening at a working dinner with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan. Observers expect her to weigh papering over disputes from both sides with the country's geostrategic value.

entries.title: Why ‘alpine summer’ is one of this year's coolest European travel trends
entries.description: According to Google Trends data, UK search interest for ‘alpine summer’ is up 82% year-on-year – with travellers seeking out mountain holidays for their coolcations in Europe.

entries.title: Alpejskie lato: jeden z najmodniejszych europejskich trendów podróżniczych
entries.description: Dane Google Trends pokazują, że w Wielkiej Brytanii zainteresowanie hasłem „alpejskie lato” wzrosło rok do roku o 82%. Brytyjczycy szukają chłodnych wakacji w europejskich górach.

entries.title: USA ponownie atakują cele w Iranie po ostrzale statków w cieśninie Ormuz
entries.description: Bahrajn, gdzie stacjonuje 5. Flota marynarki USA, w środę rano włączył syreny alarmu rakietowego. Wcześniej Iran ostrzegł Waszyngton, że po atakach USA podejmie wszelkie uznane za konieczne działania.

entries.title: 'Once the curtain is drawn, freedom is absolute': The magic and mystery of old photo booths
entries.description: Following the 100th anniversary of the first Photomatons, Euronews Culture speaks to the enthusiasts restoring and preserving them for an analogue-starved world.

entries.title: Gdy zasłona opada, wolność jest absolutna: magia i tajemnica starych fotobudek
entries.description: Sto lat po powstaniu pierwszych automatów fotograficznych Euronews Culture rozmawia z pasjonatami, którzy je odnawiają i chronią w świecie spragnionym analogu.

entries.title: Europe Today: Le Pen to run for French president as Trump revives Greenland row
entries.description: Marine Le Pen has announced she will be the far-right National Rally’s French presidential candidate after an appeals court yesterday cleared the way for her to run next year. In Turkey, NATO leaders meet for their second day of talks after Trump has reignited confrontation over Greenland.

entries.title: Could your skincare contain microplastics? | Euronews Tech Talks
entries.description: The EU restricted the use of microplastics in cosmetics in 2023, but your skincare products might still contain them. Why?

entries.title: Vikings, Victorians and vultures: UK’s first live-action historical show park to open in July
entries.description: The new attraction, Kynren – The Storied Lands, tells stories from England’s history both real and fictional across shows and immersive experiences.

entries.title: Wikingowie, wiktorianie i sępy: pierwszy w Wielkiej Brytanii park historyczny z żywymi aktorami
entries.description: Nowa atrakcja, Kynren – The Storied Lands, opowiada historie z historii Anglii, zarówno prawdziwe, jak i fikcyjne, poprzez pokazy i doświadczenia immersyjne.

entries.title: Which European countries have the cleanest swimming waters and why?
entries.description: Every summer, millions of Europeans head to beaches, lakes, and rivers. New data shows most of this water is safe, but not everywhere. Where are Europe's cleanest waters? Watch the video.

entries.title: Dolly Parton musical to open on Broadway in time for her 81st birthday
entries.description: Dolly: A True Original Musical is set to open in New York in December. Parton has described the show as “a dream come true”.

entries.title: Musical o Dolly Parton zadebiutuje na Broadwayu na jej 81. urodziny
entries.description: "Dolly: A True Original Musical" ma zadebiutować w grudniu w Nowym Jorku. Parton nazwała spektakl spełnieniem marzeń.

entries.title: Newsletter: Something is rotten in the state of Turkey
entries.description: In today's newsletter: US President Donald Trump revives his annexationist rhetoric of the arctic island of Greenland, ambassadors in Brussels bristle over what to do about Serbia, and a letter about FIFA is making waves in the European Parliament.

entries.title: Ali Khamenei's coffin passes through thousands of mourners in Iraq's holy city of Najaf
entries.description: Funeral procession for Ali Khamenei passes through Najaf as thousands of mourners gather, touching the funeral truck and honouring the late leader.

entries.title: Nadżaf: tysiące żałobników na pogrzebie Alego Chameneiego
entries.description: Kondukt żałobny Alego Chameneiego przechodzi przez Nadżaf; tysiące żałobników dotyka ciężarówki i oddaje cześć zmarłemu przywódcy.

entries.title: Watch: Fake condoms, counterfeit weight-loss pens and the toy labels testing EU borders
entries.description: Anti-fraud investigators at OLAF just broke up an international smuggling group. Criminals tried to slip their illegal cargo past European border checks as children's toys to evade customs controls. But the boxes did not contain toys at all.

entries.title: Le Pen 'will demonstrate innocence' despite embezzlement conviction, MEP Leggeri claims
entries.description: Marine Le Pen ally Fabrice Leggeri claims the National Rally presidential candidate will prove her innocence despite an appeals court upholding her conviction for the misuse of millons in EU funds on Tuesday.

entries.title: Celebrating Greece and its ancient gods: Annual polytheism festival takes place on Mount Olympus
entries.description: Mount Olympus is a sight to behold each summer as torchlight processions, symbolic ceremonies and theatrical performances bring communities together in a shared celebration of ancient Greek mythology.

entries.title: 'Greenland is not for sale' Denmark's Frederiksen reminds Trump
entries.description: The renewed dispute comes months after Donald Trump revived his long-standing ambition for the United States to acquire Greenland, a proposal repeatedly rejected by Denmark and Greenland's leaders.

entries.title: 'Russian threat' moves to the Arctic, Canadian Foreign Minister warns
entries.description: "The Russian threat is moving further and further north towards the Arctic Circle. We need to be prepared at all times across various domains", Canada's Foreign Affairs Minister, Anita Anand, said in an interview with Euronews, referring to the purchase of 12 submarines.

entries.title: NATO leaders to meet after Trump restates Greenland claim
entries.description: Trump dashed hopes of a two-day summit by telling reporters the US should "control" Greenland. The Danish prime minister hit back, calling on the US to "respect Danish sovereignty".

entries.title: Florence, Prague and Salzburg: These are the best cities in Europe, according to Travel + Leisure
entries.description: After votes were cast by more than 200,000 people, San Miguel de Allende in Mexico came out on top on the overall world list, with the highest ranked European city coming out 13th.

entries.title: Florencja, Praga i Salzburg: najlepsze miasta Europy według Travel + Leisure
entries.description: Ponad 200 tys. głosujących wskazało San Miguel de Allende w Meksyku jako najlepsze miasto świata; najwyżej ocenione europejskie zajęło dopiero 13. miejsce.

entries.title: Who in Europe is the most affected by extreme heatwaves?
entries.description: Europeans are experiencing another record-breaking heatwave, but not everyone is affected equally. Who is the most affected by these extreme climate events on the old continent?

entries.title: More than 30,000 votes cast so far in search of South Korea’s top travel spots
entries.description: South Korea has extended voting for its ambitious travel directory of the 10,000 must-visit destinations across the country. So far, more than 30,000 people have already had their say.

entries.title: Ponad 30 tys. głosów w plebiscycie na najlepsze atrakcje Korei Południowej
entries.description: Korea Południowa przedłużyła głosowanie nad ambitnym przewodnikiem po 10 tys. miejsc wartych odwiedzenia w całym kraju. Dotąd wzięło w nim udział ponad 30 tys. osób.

entries.title: Erdogan gives world leaders a ceremonial welcome ahead of NATO summit
entries.description: NATO leaders including Trump and Zelenskyy arrive in Ankara for a state dinner hosted by Erdogan ahead of key summit talks in Turkey.

entries.title: Szczyt NATO w Ankarze. Erdoğan uroczyście wita światowych przywódców
entries.description: Przywódcy NATO, w tym Trump i Zełenski, przybywają do Ankary na uroczystą kolację u Erdogana przed kluczowym szczytem.

entries.title: Got €200,000 to spare? This ultra-exclusive trip for the 2026 solar eclipse could be yours
entries.description: Meliá Hotels International’s travel package to the Balearic Islands for August’s total solar eclipse is so exclusive that it's only available for one booking at each of its two hotels. The package includes flights on a private jet, a stay in a presidential suite, and a viewing experience at sea.

entries.title: 'The Trump Curse': Is Donald Trump a bad omen for sports teams?
entries.description: Following the elimination of the US at the World Cup, social media went into a frenzy with claims of a “Trump curse”. There seems to be prior form, as fans are citing other losses linked to Trump’s team endorsements or even his presence at games.

entries.title: Spain pitches  €850bn per year in common EU borrowing
entries.description: Spanish Economy Minister Carlos Cuerpo will pitch a new common debt mechanism ahead of a meeting of euro-area finance ministers in Brussels on Thursday.

entries.title: Klątwa Trumpa: czy Donald Trump przynosi pecha drużynom sportowym?
entries.description: Po odpadnięciu USA z mundialu media społecznościowe zawrzały od komentarzy o „klątwie Trumpa”. Kibice przypominają wcześniejsze porażki drużyn, które poparł lub na których meczach się pojawił.

entries.title: Masz 200 tys. euro? Ten ultraluksusowy wyjazd na zaćmienie Słońca 2026 może być twój
entries.description: Meliá Hotels International oferuje na sierpniowe całkowite zaćmienie Słońca pakiet na Baleary: tylko jedna rezerwacja na każdy z dwóch hoteli, prywatny jet, apartament prezydencki i obserwacja z morza.

entries.title: At least seven killed in fresh Russian strikes on Ukraine as NATO leaders meet in Turkey
entries.description: Russia has hit the Ukrainian capital with several large deadly attacks over the last week, killing more than 50 this month in a spate of ballistic missile and drone strikes.

entries.title: Fake videos exploit Germany's East-West divide before key elections
entries.description: Researchers say a coordinated influence campaign they suspect to be linked to Moscow is impersonating German media to exploit East-West divisions ahead of Germany's September state elections.

entries.title: Trump attacks Spain calling it a 'wasted cause' and orders trade to stop
entries.description: The US president had already threatened in March to take economic reprisals against Spain after Moncloa blocked the use of the Rota and Morón bases for Washington’s bombing campaign against Iran.

entries.title: 43 ancient figurines discovered in Peru reveal secrets of the Americas’ oldest civilisation
